notes: Shared cluster for all three core services. Cluster Autoscaler triggered extra nodes in May due to analytics-service v2.4 resource request increase (DEPLOY-2026-089). Scaled back to 8 nodes after incident resolution.
Multi-AZ PostgreSQL 15.4. Avg CPU 72%. No read replica. INFRA-4455 evaluating adding read replica to offload reporting queries.
3-node Redis 7.2 cluster. Avg memory utilization 28% — significantly underutilized. Rightsizing to cache.r6g.medium under review. Potential saving ~$720/month.

Storage spike from 38.2TB to 82.4TB in May caused by analytics-service v2.4 raw event logging (DEPLOY-2026-089). Lifecycle policy applied 2026-05-14. Cost partially remediated — full impact visible in June 2026 billing.

No lifecycle policy. 34.6 TB total. Oldest objects from 2023-01-08. Last accessed 2026-02-14. Growing ~11% MoM. Remediation in progress — lifecycle policy draft awaiting legal review for audit-logs/ prefix.
Intelligent-Tiering lifecycle active. Compliant. ~42% of objects in archive tier. Served via CloudFront CDN.
